meta.title: How are deserts formed
meta.sourceDoc: 39. P2 - How are deserts formed 沙漠成因.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: How are deserts formed 沙漠成因

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：B
PDF 定位/解析：段落 B描述沙尘暴形成时*fine particles ... begin vibrating ... ifted into the air ... hit other particles,which are then jerked into the air in their turn"，呈现颗粒不规则跳动/运动的链式反应。

题目 15
答案：G
PDF 定位/解析：段落G开篇写道"In the2othcentury,one state in theUnited States had a large section of farmland thatturned intodesert"，明确指 出可耕地于20世纪沙化。

题目 16
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析：段落A说明"Deserts have been classified in a number of ways,generally combining..."一即不同类型/分类的沙漠。

题目 17
答案：H
PDF 定位/解析：段落H提到"Satellites,for example,have been utilised to investigate the influence that people and livestock have on our planet"，属于用 技术手段解决荒漠化问题的例子。

题目 18
答案：F
PDF 定位/解析：段落F指出战乱导致"refugees often move into someof the most vulnerableecosystems...They bring along their traditional cultivation practices"，说明迁移对沙漠化的影响。

题目 19
答案：C
PDF 定位/解析：段落C首句"theacademiccirclehasneveragreedonitscauses"直接表明科学家在成因上缺乏共识。

题目 20
答案：D
PDF 定位/解析：段落D详细说明过度放牧使"topsoil..trampledandpulverised，leavingthetopsoilexposed"，阐述畜牧耕作方式带来的有害后果。

questionSections.text:
题目 21
答案：TRUE
PDF 定位/解析：A段结尾"inotherplaces，therearenoclear-cutbordersbetweendesertsandotherlandscapefeatures"-部分地区难以界定沙漠边界。

题目 22
答案：FALSE
PDF 定位/解析：C段首句"Therehasbeenagreatdealofpublicityabouthowseveredesertificationcanbe"表明媒体/公众非常关注，而题 干说"不感兴趣"。

题目 23
答案：FALSE
PDF 定位/解析：C 段: "A common misunderstanding is that a shortage of precipitation causes desertification-yet... human activities are responsible."说明缺雨并非最常见成因，题干说是"最常见"。

题目 24
答案：TRUE
PDF 定位/解析：D段首句"Livestockfarming in semi-aridareasacceleratessoilerosion"与题干完全一致。

题目 25
答案：FALSE
PDF 定位/解析：E段："Inmany Asian countries,firewood is the chief fuel used for cooking and heating"，与题干"no longer use"相反。

题目 26
答案：FALSE
PDF 定位/解析：H段："Satellites...havebeenutilised toinvestigate theinfluencethat peopleand livestock have"-已有相关技术，而题干称尚未发明。
